title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
